title: papaver canescens
intro: Papaver canescens, also known as the woolly poppy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, and is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Papaver canescens include relief from pain, reduction of inflammation, and wound healing, making it a valuable plant in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Papaver canescens include tea, tincture, and salve, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations and wounds.
